---
title: "ESOL: Estimating Aqueous Solubility Directly from Molecular Structure"
description: "The Gradient Boosting Regressor model achieves an exceptional accuracy of 99% in predicting calories burnt during physical activities."
image: featured.png
image-alt: IDEMA book logo
categories:
  - Machine Learning 
  - Disease Diagnosis 
  - Epidemiology
  - Public Health
about:
  template: solana
  image: featured.png
---
